id.description: Stable identifier for this portable OACS record.

name.description: Human-readable stable name for the manifest or binding.

description.description: Human-readable description of the manifest or binding.

version.description: Portable schema or package version for this record.

entrypoint.description: Adapter-neutral entrypoint reference for invoking a skill.

instructions.description: Portable skill instructions; they are not implementation-specific code.

required_memory_types.description: Memory types required by this skill.

required_rules.description: RuleManifest identifiers required by this skill.

required_tools.description: ToolBinding identifiers required by this skill.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema for portable input accepted by this skill or tool.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema for portable output produced by this skill or tool.

permissions.description: Portable permission declarations requested by the skill; enforcement is implementation policy.

status.description: Lifecycle status for this record in the portable OACS model.

namespace.description: Logical namespace used to separate records without requiring a specific storage backend.

scope.description: Portable scope labels that constrain where the record applies.

owner_actor_id.description: Optional actor identifier for ownership or accountability metadata.

source_path.description: Optional source location for reference implementations or local packaging.
